title: Re-observation (shell source): runner executes the shell command before each turn and emits re_observation_injected
description: A Config.re_observation entry with source.shell causes the runner to execute the command, capture stdout, inject the content as a fresh user-role observation into the next turn's context, and emit re_observation_injected with source_kind='shell'. NO supervisor interaction occurs for shell-source observations.

forbidden_events.label: shell-source re-observations MUST NOT emit re_observation_request
